case_title: BAY DOOR INC. VS GRACIANO CONSTRUCTION INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY BAY DOOR INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GRACIANO CONSTRUCTION INC. GRACIANO VINCENT SURETY COMPANY OF THE PACIFIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT SURETY COMPANY OF THE PACIFIC
CERTIFIED MAIL TO SURETY CO. RETURNED SIGNED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GRACIANO VINCENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GRACIANO CONSTRUCTION INC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY DOOR INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRACIANO VINCENT $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,205.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM JOJN E. JONES ATTY FILED.
